data.approach: Theoretical architecture design through iterative conversation. Ideas developed session by session, corrections applied when misunderstandings identified. Photo recognition (MNIST) used as concrete test case. Modular substrate approach: start with base prototype, upgrade paths evaluated empirically against measured failures.
constraints: Base prototype only — no hyperedges, no weights, no second system yet
Graph isomorphism computational cost is a known concern — profiled in Phase 6
Unbounded parameter growth in hierarchy is a known concern
Substrate upgrade decisions are manual researcher decisions at training start
data.test_domain: MNIST digit recognition — chosen as well-understood benchmark with labels, manageable scale, and clear success metric

notes: Migrated from research.methodology s_08. Updated to reflect MNIST decision and modular substrate approach.
